title: move_anndata_slots
description:
Move slots (.obs, .var, .obsm, .varm, .obsp, .varp, .uns) from a modality
in a source MuData file into a modality in a target MuData file.
The specified slots are copied from the source modality into the target
modality. By default, copying to a key that already exists in the target
raises an error; use --allow_overwrite to overwrite it instead.

Dataset input.title: Dataset input
Dataset input.description: Dataset input using nf-tower "dataset" or "data explorer". Allows for the input of multiple         parameter sets to initialise a Nextflow channel.

param_list.description: Dataset input can either be a list of maps, a csv file, a json file, a yaml file, or simply a yaml                 blob. The names of the input fields (e.g. csv columns, json keys) need to be an exact match with the workflow input parameters.

input_source.description: Source h5mu file to read slots from.

source_modality.description: Modality in the source h5mu file to read slots from.

input_target.description: Target h5mu file to write slots into.

target_modality.description:
Modality in the target h5mu file to write slots into.
Defaults to the value of --source_modality.

obs.description:
Column names from .obs to move from the source modality to the
target modality

var.description:
Column names from .var to move from the source modality to the
target modality

obsm.description:
Keys from .obsm to move from the source modality to the target
modality

varm.description:
Keys from .varm to move from the source modality to the target
modality

obsp.description:
Keys from .obsp to move from the source modality to the target
modality

varp.description:
Keys from .varp to move from the source modality to the target
modality

uns.description:
Keys from .uns to move from the source modality to the target
modality

allow_overwrite.description:
Allow overwriting keys that already exist in the target modality.
By default, the component raises an error if a key already exists.
When enabled, existing keys are overwritten with a warning.

output.description: Output h5mu file (the target with slots added from the source).
output.help_text: Type: `file`, multiple: `False`, required, default: `"$id.$key.output.h5mu"`, direction: `output`, example: `"output.h5mu"`.

output_compression.description:
Compression format to use for the output AnnData and/or Mudata H5 files.
By default no compression is applied.

nextflow input-output arguments.title: Nextflow input-output arguments
nextflow input-output arguments.description: Input/output parameters for Nextflow itself. Please note that both publishDir and publish_dir are supported but at least one has to be configured.
